Biography
Biography
Sarita Singh is an associate teaching professor at the Khoury College of Computer Sciences at Northeastern University’s Seattle campus. She earned her PhD in computer science.
Prior to joining Northeastern, she accumulated more than 25 years of work experience in areas including teaching, industry, and research. Over the years she has worked with various organizations and universities in Singapore, Malaysia and India, and has also taught undergraduate and graduate courses for UK and Australian degree programs.
Outside of work, Singh enjoys music and art.
